# Case recover-after-loader-error: Step 2

## Changed Files
- a.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 28
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 981

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./loader.js!./a.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./loader.js!./a.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (3);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
(() => {

__rspack_require.d = function (exports, getters, values) {
  var define = function (defs, kind) {
    for(var key in defs) {
      if(__rspack_require.o(defs, key) && !__rspack_require.o(exports, key)) {
        Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { configurable: true, enumerable: true, [kind]: defs[key] });
      }
    }
  }
  define(getters, "get");
  define(values, "value");
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```




## Runtime
### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```



### JavaScript

#### Outdated

Outdated Modules:
- ./loader.js!./a.js


Outdated Dependencies:
```json
{
  "./index.js": [
    "./loader.js!./a.js"
  ]
}
```

#### Updated

Updated Modules:
- ./loader.js!./a.js

Updated Runtime:
- `__rspack_require.h`


#### Callback

Accepted Callback:
- ./loader.js!./a.js

Disposed Callback:
